mapper.select: select pt.id, pt.name, pt.pay_month_count, pt.additional_info from room_payment_type as rpt left join payment_type as pt on rpt.payment_type_id = pt.id and pt.is_deleted = 0 where rpt.room_id = #{id} and rpt.is_deleted = 0

select pt.id, pt.name, pt.pay_month_count, pt.additional_info from room_payment_type as rpt left join payment_type as pt on rpt.payment_type_id = pt.id and pt.is_deleted = 0 where rpt.room_id = #{id} and rpt.is_deleted = 0
